an engineer personal profile am a 24-year-old, italian, honest and friendly individual. my sociable character and several experiences abroad make me broad-minded, flexible and willing to travel for work. my curiosity, passion and hunger to learn encourage me to further deepen my knowledge of aeronautics. willingly look forward to new challenges. education masters degree in aeronautical engineering, sapienza, university of rome. o grade: 109/110 o academic path: aerodynamics, propulsion and structure (aps), with particular insight into flight mechanics and dynamics and automatic controls (thesis work). o thesis: dynamics and control of a lightweight tailsitter uav". a novel tailsitter uav configuration has been studied, namely: - a trim and a stability analyses have been performed - an optimization process has been considered for the transition maneuvers (vertical to horizontal and horizontal to vertical) - a control architecture has been proposed for the vehicle. bachelor's degree in aerospace engineering, 'sapienza, university of rome. o grade: 102/110 o thesis: evaluation of the performances of aeronautical engines provided with turbine- burners". scientific high school degree, scientific high school 'g.b. morgagni, rome. o grade: 100/100 international university experience "design build fly" contest (wichita, kansas), american institute of aeronautics and as- tronautics (aiaa). concerning uav design (written design report) and construction. several flight missions during the contest. participation in the sapienza flight team (the only italian team in the 2014 competition) as: o control and stability lead o cad engineer optimization engineer participation in the competition in wichita, kansas, in april 2014. final result: 18* place design report: 10" place, out of 80 teams. erasmus exchange programme (madrid, spain), universidad politécnica de madrid. a full university academic year. 1/2 dec 2013 may 2012 august 2013 2011-2012 2014present 2012present 2012-2014 summer 2011 summer 2010 summer 2009 summer 2008 software programming languages italian english spanish portuguese language certificates and courses certificate in advanced english (cae), level c1. dele certificate in advanced spanish, level c1. kaplan international college bournemouth, england. o intensive english course -
